human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-952 is descriptor-only production-ready; HRX runtime opening, HRPermission runtime, SensitiveGuard runtime, policy execution, decision emission, record writes, permission bypass, payroll runtime, runtime receipts, separate HRX product claims, enterprise trust, production deployment, real sensitive HR data, credentials, secrets, and final human approval remain deferred to CP00-953/RP30.P06.M07.S02 or later human-approved packs.
